summary: Iteration 13 Testing COMPLETED: All Hero Section responsive layout features verified. Backend 17/17 tests passed. Frontend responsive layout working correctly at Desktop (1920px), Tablet (768px), and Mobile (375px).

issues: Minor: React hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/hero-slides returns 200 with active slides
Backend: Hero slides contain all coordinate fields (title_x/y, subtitle_x/y, description_x/y, button_x/y, media_x/y)
Backend: Hero slides have required content fields (id, title, slide_type)
Backend: Coordinate values are numeric
Backend: Admin login with admin@consultant.com / Admin123! returns token
Backend: Wrong password correctly rejected with 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/hero-slides returns list of slides
Backend: POST /api/admin/hero-slides creates new slide
Backend: PUT /api/admin/hero-slides/{id} updates slide
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/hero-slides/{id} deletes slide
Backend: GET /api/public/hero returns 200
Backend: GET /api/public/about returns 200
Backend: GET /api/public/services returns 200
Backend: GET /api/public/sections returns 200
Backend: GET /api/public/testimonials returns 200
Backend: GET /api/admin/hero (legacy) returns 200
Backend: PUT /api/admin/hero (legacy) returns 200
Frontend: Hero section renders on desktop (1920px) with absolute positioning
Frontend: Desktop hero container (hidden lg:block) visible with position: absolute
Frontend: Hero slide indicator dots found (3 dots)
Frontend: Clicking indicator dots changes slides
Frontend: Tablet (768px) hero container (lg:hidden) uses flex-direction: column
Frontend: Mobile (375px) hero container (lg:hidden) uses flex-direction: column
Frontend: Mobile CTA button visible and clickable
Frontend: Admin login via modal works correctly
Frontend: Admin Hero Manager page loads and displays slides
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows all stats correctly
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed slide during CRUD testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 verified: (1) Hero section responsive layout works correctly - Desktop (1920px) uses absolute positioning via 'hidden lg:block' div, Mobile/Tablet (<1024px) uses stacked flex layout via 'lg:hidden' div with flex-direction: column. (2) All backend CRUD endpoints for hero slides work. (3) Admin login and Hero Manager page functional. (4) Slide indicator dots work for navigation between slides. Existing slides: 'Welcome to Legacy' (Video), 'titulo' (Photo).

slide_navigation.click_navigation: working - slides change on dot click
